data.name: Hentai Furry Goat
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Furry Goat — a charming anime puzzle game featuring a playful mountain goat girl



Hentai Furry Goat is an adult anime puzzle game that blends relaxing gameplay, logic challenges, and cozy mountain aesthetics. The main character is a cute and energetic goat girl from the highlands, with soft fur, curved horns, bright eyes, and a playful, mischievous personality.


As you progress through the game, you will unlock new illustrations of the goat heroine in different outfits and scenic mountain settings. Each completed challenge reveals more of her lively spirit and charming style.


🔹 Game Features:


  • Two mini-games in each stage:

    • A classic memory game — flip cards and find matching pairs.

    • A puzzle featuring the goat heroine unlocked after completing the memory challenge.

    • Completing both stages reveals a new illustration.

  • Progression rewards: unlock new images as you advance.

  • Extra content:

    • Achievements for players.

    • Gallery with unlocked images.

    • Three difficulty levels.


Relax, solve puzzles, and explore the charming mountain world of Hentai Furry Goat.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
